title: Collab-RAG: Collaborative Training for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with White-Box Small Language Models and Black-Box Large Language Models

defines.name: Collab-RAG
defines.definition: A collaborative RAG framework that trains a white-box small language model to decompose complex questions and improve retrieval and reasoning for a black-box large language model reader.

problem: Standard RAG struggles on multi-hop questions because retrieval returns irrelevant context and the reader lacks sufficient complex reasoning ability.
